AI_Insights.title: Focus on IT & Software
AI_Insights.body: IT & Software accounts generated the most meetings with 28. Continue to prioritize outreach to this sector.

AI_Insights.title: Automotive & Manufacturing Yield
AI_Insights.body: Automotive and Manufacturing each generated 10 meetings. These are significant sectors to continue prospecting.

AI_Insights.title: Prioritize Bengaluru & Hyderabad
AI_Insights.body: Bengaluru and Hyderabad accounted for 32 and 25 meetings respectively. Concentrate outbound efforts in these two cities.

AI_Insights.title: Target Directors and Heads
AI_Insights.body: Directors and Heads represent 28 and 20 meetings booked. Focus outreach on these seniority levels.

AI_Insights.title: Explore Pharma & Education
AI_Insights.body: While Pharma and Education have fewer meetings (4 and 3), they show potential for less saturated outreach. Consider targeted campaigns.

AI_Insights.title: Deprioritize Mumbai & Pune
AI_Insights.body: Mumbai and Pune contributed only 1 and 2 meetings, respectively. Reduce focus on these cities for now.

AI_Insights.title: Virtual Meetings Dominate
AI_Insights.body: Virtual meetings accounted for 42 leads compared to 26 in-person meetings. Continue leveraging virtual channels for broader reach.

AI_Insights.title: C-Level Engagement is Lower
AI_Insights.body: C-Level executives, while valuable, resulted in only 8 meetings booked, compared to Directors and Heads. Balance outreach efforts accordingly.
